NEXT_TELEMETRY_DISABLED.description: Disable Next.js telemetry in production/runtime environments.

HOSTNAME.description: Bind address for web server (IPv6-compatible for Railway networking).

SQLITE_DB_PATH.description: Persistent SQLite file path for web-side application data (requires /data volume mount).

INTERNAL_CORE_BASE_URL.description: Private base URL used by web service to call core APIs.

INTERNAL_SERVICE_TOKEN.description: Shared internal token used to authenticate calls to core service.

AUTH_SECRET.description: Auth.js/NextAuth signing secret for session and token security.

AUTH_URL.description: Canonical external URL used by auth callbacks and redirects.

NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL.description: Public frontend base URL exposed to browser/client-side code.

BOOK_SOURCE_MODE.description: Book ingestion mode expected by web workflows and admin tooling.

BOOK_SOURCE_DIR.description: Path reference for source content location (kept aligned with core).

BOOK_IMPORT_MANIFEST.description: Manifest file path used by web-triggered import flows.

BOOK_IMPORT_ENABLED.description: Allow web-triggered import operations when enabled.

BOOK_IMPORT_DRY_RUN.description: Run import validation mode from web flows without persistent writes.
